For Order Changing Venue Of Action And For Attorney'S Fees And Expenses Pursuant To Ccp 396b
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant J.C. PENNEY COMPANY's motion for change of venue to Butte county is granted. Request for attorneys fees/expenses granted in the amount of $798.00. (Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE (301); Court Reporter ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855
